betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Blast Furnace Extension§f

§aBoost your blast furnace speed without extra fuel cost.§f

The §bBlast Furnace Extension§f is placed on top of a blast furnace to dramatically increase its processing speed while keeping fuel consumption the same.

§6Crafting§f:
Made from copper plates, firebrick, and steel grates at a crafting table.

§6Installation§f:
Place the extension on top of your existing blast furnace. It automatically activates.

§eTip§f: Even with the extension, consider building multiple furnaces in parallel for more throughput.
